title: ActivationPlatformField - Metadata API
description: Represents the information about the fields used in ActivationPlatform.

activationPlatform.description: Reference to the ActivationPlatform metadata type.

isHidden.description: Indicates whether ActivationPlatformField can be overridden by marketer (false) or not (true). The default is false. Field can’t be overridden by marketer when set to true.

isRequired.description: Indicates whether this ActivationPlatformField is required (true) or not (false). The default is false.

type.description: Represents the datatype of the field.Valid value is: Text

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The following is an example of an ActivationPlatformField component.
